Class AsyncApi30OperationBindingsImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.asyncapi.v3x.v30.AsyncApi30OperationBindingsImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
